title: Representative
description: The attorney, agent, or authorized person filing an assessment appeal on behalf of a property owner before the Tax Commission. Reverse-engineered from the representative section of the application forms (TC101 et al.) and reconciled with the attorney fields carried in the Open Article 7 Petitions dataset (aht6-vxai: 'Attorney Name', 'Attorney Identifier').

type.description: Relationship to the applicant / capacity in which they file.

attorneyIdentifier.description: Tax Commission / court attorney identifier ('Attorney Identifier').
